overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest trail. The character moves from an open pine forest through a transitional area with stone walls, eventually ascending a stone stairway. The lighting suggests morning with partly cloudy skies and high-quality game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pine forest trail with scattered ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wide forest trail, weapons sheathed on his back

entered.detail: Dense pine and spruce trees forming the forest backdrop
Winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
Small boulders and rocky outcrops beside the path
Wooden fence posts and beams visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide forest trail in a coniferous woodland. Geralt walks forward along the dirt path surrounded by dense pine trees and scattered rocks. The morning light filters through the canopy, illuminating patches of wildflowers along the trail.

events.description: encountering a peasant NPC standing on the left side of the trail
path narrows as dry stone wall appears on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the trail, passing a villager and approaching a more enclosed path with stone walls

notable_agents.action: peasant villager standing by the path wearing purple clothing and a hat

entered.detail: Low stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
Non-player character standing beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks past a standing villager on the left as the trail transitions from open forest to a more defined path. A dry stone wall appears on the right side, guiding the path forward. The vegetation becomes less dense as the character approaches what appears to be a more settled area.

events.description: entering enclosed stone pathway with walls on both sides
path becomes steeper with distinct stone steps requiring ascent

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the stone steps between the walls, moving uphill through the enclosed passage

entered.detail: Matching stone wall on the left side enclosing the path
Defined stone steps and cobblestones replacing the dirt trail
Large rock outcrop and cliff visible beyond the left wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt ascending a stone stairway enclosed by dry stone walls on both sides. The path transitions from dirt to cobblestone steps as it climbs upward through the forest. The lighting becomes more diffused and sheltered by the surrounding trees and rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a forest trail transforms from an open coniferous woodland into a structured stone ascent. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path surrounded by dense pine trees and scattered rocks, where morning light filters through the canopy to illuminate wildflowers. As he moves forward, the trail transitions into a more defined path, passing a standing villager and following a dry stone wall that appears on the right. The scene then shifts from the open forest to a more settled area where the vegetation thins, before the path turns into a series of cobblestone steps. Finally, the camera follows the ascent up a stone stairway enclosed by walls on both sides, with the lighting becoming more diffused and sheltered by the surrounding rock formations and trees.
